## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Scope
- [ ] Focused to a single concern
- [ ] Prompt sequence impact reviewed (`00-common.md` + relevant numbered prompts)

## Validation
- [ ] Markdown lint passes
- [ ] Links validated
- [ ] CI checks pass

## Documentation
- [ ] `README.md` updated for behavior changes (how to use)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (what changed and why)

## Versioning
- [ ] Minor bump required (new feature)
- [ ] No minor bump (bugfix/docs/chore)
- [ ] Major bump required (major overhaul)
- [ ] `version.json` reviewed/updated accordingly
